global.description: The ad features a textured background with a prominent logo and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting flexible booking options with a free trial and discount.

elements.label: Textured abstract background
elements.description: A textured abstract background with a mix of muted colors and patterns, creating a visually engaging backdrop.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: The logo 'HorizonHop' is prominently displayed at the top, featuring bold, modern typography in a bright color.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter Flexible booking options' is centered, using a large, clear font that stands out against the background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free', designed in a contrasting color to attract attention.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' in a bold font, positioned near the bottom to indicate a discount.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA and discount badge are at the bottom.
